clubs.name: BC Coding Club
clubs.mission: helping students build practical software projects and learn modern tooling
clubs.signature_hook: hands-on demos, beginner-friendly pairing, and a take-home project idea
promotion_checklist: Share the announcement in the club newsletter and first-year student channels.
Add a one-line accessibility note and room directions.
Confirm a 10-minute welcome block and a clear end-of-event next step.

clubs.name: Eco Action Collective
clubs.mission: turning campus sustainability ideas into volunteer projects and measurable action
clubs.signature_hook: quick project sign-ups and a student-led planning circle
promotion_checklist: Post one clear call to action with the volunteer shift signup form.
Highlight what newcomers can do even if they have never joined before.
Bring a simple QR code slide for check-in and follow-up.

clubs.name: Heights Debate Society
clubs.mission: helping students practice persuasive speaking, argument structure, and live feedback
clubs.signature_hook: a mini practice round with coaching from experienced debaters
promotion_checklist: Include the debate topic and a beginner-friendly framing sentence.
Invite students to attend as either speakers or observers.
Send a same-day reminder with location and arrival time.
